title: Cobblemon: Path to Legends
description: A Cobblemon addon adding Legendary Structures based on MegaShowDown
body:
![pack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eadb82f3bf2f79db377de239cdb7206b7e4c201f.png)

---

![Groudon banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c5c0b3743f95c597b52087d47feabdca26a014c.jpeg)  
![Kyogre banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ebeb7e287802e026cc6e387f31d26743b0d206b.jpeg)

> ⚠️ **This datapack is still in development!**  
> Expect missing features, bugs, and placeholder content.  
> Feedback is highly appreciated to help improve future versions!  
> 💬 Join our [Discord support channel](https://discord.com/channels/1334216416617824386/1384892837228707860) in Megashowdown Discord server
 ---
## ⚠️ Known incompatible:
 - **Legends Untold**
 - **CobbleTowns-CobbleDollar-Shops**(solution can be found in our FAQ)
 - **Any mod that would limit pokemon from worldspawning**
 ---

## 🧩 Features

- 🏛️ Adds unique structures that allow you to summon **Legendary Pokémon**, powered by [MegaShowdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) and based on [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)  
  *(Be sure to install both mods before using this datapack!)*
- 🔥 Currently includes: **Groudon**, **Kyogre**, **Rayquaza**, **Zekrom**, **Reshiram**, **Kyurem**, **Lake Trio**, **Dialga**, **Palkia**, **Giratina**, and **Arceus**
- 🌌 Planned additions: **Genesect**, **Mew**, **MewTwo** and **Ogerpon**
- ✨ Each structure has a **1 in 100 chance** to spawn a **Shiny Pokémon**
--- 
![sky_pillar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6a603cfcc92c0b66b14312470bf82765928a911.jpeg)
---



## ⚠️ Notes

- 📦 Place the datapack in **both** the `datapacks` folder **and** the `resourcepacks` folder
- 💾 Back up your world before using the datapack!
- ✅ If your playing as server-side **"enable-command-block"** in **server.properties** must be set to true
- ❌ Do **not** use `/kill @e` or `/kill @e[type=armor_stand]` doing so will break key systems!
- ✨ Most of the key items are based on MegaShowDown items, others are added with custom item modeled command block(that’s why we’re incompatible with  Legends Untold), all of them should be able to obtain from the structure, but I still recommend using MSD Loot Table Addon from their [Discord](https://discord.com/channels/1334216416617824386/1358416005189079180).




## 🎮 How It Works

- Each legendary structure has a **one-time chance** to spawn a Legendary Pokémon  
- Once activated, a structure **cannot** be used again for the same legendary  
- To trigger a spawn, players must collect specific **Key Items** from **MegaShowdown**
- There are various unique methods to activate the spawn system!
- 🪨 *Example:* placing a key item on a pedestal to trigger a legendary spawn

---
![pedestal example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31cfd491fb0f3194ef8b618bfb963de5520c5d48.jpeg)
---
- (and many other spawning system for you to find out!)
- 💡 Need any help? Use our [Discord support channel](https://discord.com/channels/1334216416617824386/1355174166470328341) or read the FAQ for hints!
